name: ultraprompt
description: Ultraprompt V9.2 cognitive control-plane plugin for Claude Code and Codex: 56 skills, 35 agents, 42 MCP tools, 33 commands, typed local memory, safe dream jobs, governed learning, workflow pathfinding, capability graph, live Mission Control dashboard, evidence-led release gates, dual-runtime install. V9.2 completes the release-integrity pass: a single VERSION file is the source of truth for every version site; render-manifest --check now fails CI on any version drift (CHANGELOG, the Codex manifest, and the rendered manifests must all agree); the SubagentStart hook is single-sourced so POSIX and Windows cannot diverge; and README plus manifest catalog counts render from one template so they cannot go stale.
